title: dillenia oblonga
intro: Dillenia oblonga, also known as the Copper Leaf or Copper Dillenia, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Dilleniaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dillenia oblonga include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Dillenia oblonga is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
